rationale: Gov't Code §1504.002 governs municipal revenue bond issuance for facilities. It has no relation to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The governing body of a municipality by ordinance may issue revenue bonds to provide all or part of the money to establish, acquire, construct, improve, enlarge, equip, or repair a facility described by Section 1504.001(a).
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and municipal revenue bond authority.
